title: masdevallia niesseniae
intro: Masdevallia niesseniae is a species of orchid native to the Andes mountains in South America, particularly in Ecuador and Colombia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Masdevallia niesseniae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Masdevallia niesseniae can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
